liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem.TestSystem.Definition

    Package Description
    liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem  
    liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem.core  

    • Uses of TestSystem.Definition in liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem

      Methods in liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem that return TestSystem.Definition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      TestSystem.Definition TestSystem.getDefinition()
      Return the definition of this test system.
      static TestSystem.Definition TestSystem.Definition.parse(String definition) 
      Methods in liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem with parameters of type TestSystem.Definition 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int TestSystem.Definition.compareTo(TestSystem.Definition o) 
      int TestSystem.getPriority(TestSystem.Definition definition)
      Default implementation returns PRIORITY_DEFAULT if the name matches the given definition, without taking any profiles etc.
      TestSystem TestSystemFactory.getTestSystem(TestSystem.Definition definition)
      Return the TestSystem for the given TestSystem.Definition.
